dependencies.role: accuracy-first SNES/APU runtime and capture backend prototype
dependencies.license_policy: ISC/permissive for core ares; bundled third-party notices must be reviewed before vendoring or binary distribution.
dependencies.integration_policy: External checkout/build for now. Future submodule is acceptable after license-notice review; avoid copying a carved subset until the boundary is stable.
dependencies.distribution_policy: May be distributed with notices if license review is complete; current generated outputs remain local only.

dependencies.license_policy: LGPL-2.1; dynamic/external linkage preferred for app distribution, with notices and relinkability/source obligations respected.
dependencies.integration_policy: External checkout/build for now. Keep the renderer swappable and avoid GPL-only optional components in the core path.
dependencies.distribution_policy: Can support local playback/export with LGPL compliance; generated SPC/WAV outputs remain user-local ROM-derived artifacts.

dependencies.role: optional reference oracles for accuracy comparison
dependencies.license_policy: GPL or mixed/non-core policies; keep optional and out-of-process unless the project intentionally changes license posture.
dependencies.integration_policy: Use for comparison captures, not required app playback/export.
dependencies.distribution_policy: Do not bundle as a required core dependency without explicit licensing decision.

release_gates: Generated ROM-derived SPC/WAV/PCM/sample outputs must stay ignored and out of commits.
Dependency notices must be included before distributing binaries that invoke or link renderer backends.
LGPL renderer integration must preserve relinkability or remain external/plugin-like.
GPL reference tools must remain optional or out-of-process unless the whole relevant distribution adopts compatible terms.
Public docs must state that end users provide their own ROM and that audio exports are generated locally.
